title: deny ["*"] -> every tool is removed from the model's toolset (bare glob deny = context removal at scale)

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $CASE_DIR/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.

hypothesis: Docs (spec-inventory §2): deny/ask accept tool-name wildcards ('*', 'mcp__*'), and bare glob deny removes the matched tools from context. deny ['*'] is the maximal case: every tool disappears from the toolset, the model cannot make any tool call (no denials recorded), and the structural signal is the init-message tool list being empty — the harness detects the missing target tool there (same mechanism as P2-b's Write removal, scaled to all tools). The practical variant deny ['mcp__*'] (MCP supply-chain kill switch) needs an MCP fixture and remains an open gap.
